hm3301_init.tooltip: Initialize HM3301 laser dust sensor (I2C, address 0x40)

hm3301_read.tooltip: Read particulate matter concentration from HM3301 sensor

hm3301_i2c_board_extension.tooltip_esp32: Initialize HM3301 sensor, ESP32 requires SDA/SCL pin configuration
hm3301_i2c_board_extension.tooltip_mega: Initialize HM3301 sensor (Mega2560 I2C pins fixed: SDA->20, SCL->21)
hm3301_i2c_board_extension.tooltip_uno: Initialize HM3301 sensor (Arduino UNO I2C pins fixed: SDA->A4, SCL->A5)
